description: desire to explore ideas and questions

how much levity and experimentation the role brings to its output

how effectively the role separates evaluation from advocacy or preference
how consistently the role follows structured process rather than intuitive leaps

how effectively the role distills multiple inputs into a unified coherent output

how effectively the role distinguishes what matters most from supporting detail
how fluidly the role weaves together inputs from different roles and sources

how receptively the role engages with unexpected or counterintuitive directions

how well the role builds on and responds to the contributions of other roles

how effectively the role pushes back without dismissing or undermining prior work
how actionably the role identifies weaknesses and paths to strengthen them
how freely the role contributes knowledge without competitive or territorial behavior
how effectively the role develops output that advances the work of the full team
